art_market.summary: Global art sales grew 4% in 2025 to $59.6 billion, signaling a return to growth. The ultra-high-end segment (+$10M) surged 30% at auction.
key_trends: Return to growth led by high-end and public auction rebound.
Great Wealth Transfer driving younger, digital-first demographics.
Market outlook: 43% of dealers anticipate improved sales in 2026.

korean_market.summary: KOSPI closed at 5,781.20 (+0.31%) on March 20, 2026, supported by hopes for easing Mideast tensions.
korean_market.sentiment: Cautious optimism driven by geopolitical hopes, despite heavy foreign selling.
